# Think College Level

Think College Level is a personal blog and portfolio with a small, editable surface area.

## Pages
- Home: https://thinkcollegelevel.com/
- Portfolio: https://thinkcollegelevel.com/portfolio/
- Writing: https://thinkcollegelevel.com/blog/
- About: https://thinkcollegelevel.com/about/
- Contact: https://thinkcollegelevel.com/contact/

## Writing
- Starting from clarity: https://thinkcollegelevel.com/blog/starting-from-clarity/
- Keeping the edit path short: https://thinkcollegelevel.com/blog/keeping-the-edit-path-short/
- Publishing notes instead of noise: https://thinkcollegelevel.com/blog/publishing-notes-instead-of-noise/
